message:
perf(alloc): pre-size collections and reduce heap churn across core subsystems

Add with_capacity to Vecs, VecDeques, HashMaps, and BinaryHeaps at
construction sites throughout the codebase where the expected initial
population is known or can be reasonably estimated. This eliminates
incremental reallocation during the first N insertions and reduces
allocator pressure under load.

Channel: mpsc send_wakers VecDeque(4).
Cx/registry: granted/notifications Vec(8); replace chained
  iterator .filter().map().collect() with explicit loop + pre-sized Vec
  in cleanup_names_region and cleanup_task_at to avoid two full
  iterations and intermediate allocations.
Record: distributed_region replicas(3) + transitions(MAX_HISTORY);
  symbol_obligation_tracker obligations/by_symbol/by_object HashMap(16),
  or_default → or_insert_with(|| Vec::with_capacity(2)) for index
  vectors, check_leaks/abort_expired/abort_expired_deadlines Vec
  pre-sized to obligations.len().
Runtime: deadline_monitor DurationHistory samples VecDeque,
  monitored Vec(16), history HashMap(16);
  io_driver interests HashMap with new interest_map_capacity() helper
  that scales with events_capacity, plus capacity assertion in test;
  obligation_table by_holder Vec(32);
  state snapshot obligations_by_task HashMap pre-sized to obligations_len,
  cancel_siblings/cancel_request/collect_region_tree Vecs pre-sized to
  live task/region counts.
Sync: mutex waiters VecDeque(4); pool idle VecDeque(8) + waiters
  VecDeque(4), close drain uses SmallVec<[Waker; 4]>.
Time: wheel overflow BinaryHeap(8), ready Vec(8), active HashMap(64).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -347,8 +347,8 @@ impl DistributedRegionRecord {
             id,
             state: DistributedRegionState::Initializing,
             config,
-            replicas: Vec::new(),
-            transitions: VecDeque::new(),
+            replicas: Vec::with_capacity(3),
+            transitions: VecDeque::with_capacity(MAX_TRANSITION_HISTORY),
             last_replicated: None,
             parent,
             budget,

@@ -986,14 +986,14 @@ where
             factory,
             config,
             state: PoolMutex::new(GenericPoolState {
-                idle: std::collections::VecDeque::new(),
+                idle: std::collections::VecDeque::with_capacity(8),
                 active: 0,
                 creating: 0,
                 total_created: 0,
                 total_acquisitions: 0,
                 total_wait_time: Duration::ZERO,
                 closed: false,
-                waiters: std::collections::VecDeque::new(),
+                waiters: std::collections::VecDeque::with_capacity(4),
                 next_waiter_id: 0,
             }),
             return_tx,
@@ -1544,7 +1544,7 @@ where
                 self.closed.store(true, Ordering::Release);
 
                 // Drain waiters, then wake after releasing the state lock.
-                let waiters: Vec<Waker> =
+                let waiters: SmallVec<[Waker; 4]> =
                     state.waiters.drain(..).map(|waiter| waiter.waker).collect();
 
                 // Record how many idle resources we're clearing (only needed for metrics)

@@ -369,11 +369,11 @@ impl TimerWheel {
         Self {
             current_tick,
             levels,
-            overflow: BinaryHeap::new(),
-            ready: Vec::new(),
+            overflow: BinaryHeap::with_capacity(8),
+            ready: Vec::with_capacity(8),
             next_id: 0,
             next_generation: 0,
-            active: HashMap::new(),
+            active: HashMap::with_capacity(64),
             config,
             coalescing,
         }
